notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Carson Kelly out at 1st.
